issues.sample: The car was involved in a fatal crash where the side impact airbag (side of fatality) failed to deploy and the EDR failed to fully comply with Part 563 requirements.  All other airbags and rollover system deployed but the EDR recorded only the deployment of the side impact airbag

narrative.headline: What 2018 Audi R8 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (100% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: The car was involved in a fatal crash where the side impact airbag (side of fatality) failed to deploy and the EDR failed to fully comply with Part 563 requirements.  All other airbags and rollover system deployed but the EDR recorded only the deployment of the side impact airbag
issues.title: Air Bags
